name: Product Card - Standard
description: Standard visual card (300x400px) for displaying ad inventory products

requirements.description: Primary product image or placement preview
Display name of the product (e.g., 'Homepage Leaderboard')
Short description of the product (supports markdown)
Publisher or property name (e.g., 'Pinnacle News Group')
Click-through URL for the product card (e.g., product detail page)
Primary product image or placement preview
Display name of the product (e.g., 'Homepage Leaderboard')
Short description of the product (supports markdown)

name: Product Card - Detailed
description: Detailed card with carousel and full specifications for rich product presentation

requirements.description: Primary product image or placement preview
Display name of the product (e.g., 'Homepage Leaderboard')
Detailed description of the product (supports markdown)
Publisher or property name (e.g., 'Pinnacle News Group')
Click-through URL for the product card (e.g., product detail page)
Primary product image or placement preview
Display name of the product (e.g., 'Homepage Leaderboard')
Detailed description of the product (supports markdown)

name: Proposal Card - Standard
description: Standard visual card (300x400px) for displaying media plan proposals with allocation bars and budget guidance

requirements.description: JSON array of allocations: [{product_id, allocation_percentage, rationale}]
Narrative explanation of how the proposal aligns with the brief
Publisher or network name (e.g., 'Pinnacle News Group')
Hero image for the proposal card header
Click-through URL for the proposal card (e.g., interactive proposal page)
JSON array of allocations: [{product_id, allocation_percentage, rationale}]

name: Proposal Card - Detailed
description: Detailed card with full allocation breakdown, rationale, and budget for rich proposal presentation

requirements.description: JSON array of allocations: [{product_id, allocation_percentage, rationale}]

name: Sponsored Recommendation
description: AI assistant sponsored recommendation woven into the conversation response. The LLM integrates the brand message naturally into its reply.

requirements.description: Short headline for the recommendation (50 chars max)
Body text describing the product or service. The AI assistant may paraphrase this to fit the conversation tone.
Sponsor attribution text (e.g., 'Sponsored by Meridian Foods')

name: Native Product Card
description: Product card for AI assistants and retail media surfaces. Displays a product with image, price, and catalog items. Rendered as a card within the conversation or search results.

requirements.description: Product or offer headline (60 chars max)

name: Native Brand Mention
description: Minimal brand mention for AI assistants. A single line referencing the brand, suitable for light integration where a full product card would be intrusive.

requirements.description: Brand mention text (100 chars max). Should read naturally in conversation context.
Destination URL if user clicks the mention
